title: Philippiamra calycina
intro: Philippiamra calycina, also known as Philippiamra or Calycina, is a plant species used in traditional medicine, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its use in treating various conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems. The bioactive constituents of Philippiamra calycina include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Philippiamra calycina is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in the production of various herbal remedies, including ointments and salves.
